title: Dashboard activity
excerpt: We have an open workspace with a high count of users who will be viewing the dashboards. We want to track dashboard activity to see how many people have visited each dashboard.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml: We have an open workspace with a high count of users who will be viewing the dashboards. We want to track dashboard activity to see how many people have visited each dashboard.
